## How to Test

Steps to verify the changes work correctly:

## Checklist

- [ ] Code compiles with no warnings (`cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings`)
- [ ] Code is formatted (`cargo fmt --all --check` and `pnpm format:check`)
- [ ] Tests added/updated and passing (`cargo test --workspace` and `pnpm test`)
- [ ] Public APIs have doc comments
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets or credentials
- [ ] PR is scoped to a single concern (not bundling unrelated changes)

## Screenshots / Demo

If applicable, add screenshots or a short demo.
